properties.displayName: Browser Automation Tools for Click Fraud
properties.description: Detects browser automation tools commonly used for click fraud
properties.query:
Event
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| where (Image|endswith has "\chromedriver.exe" or Image|endswith has "\geckodriver.exe" or Image|endswith has "\selenium-server.exe" or Image|endswith has "\phantom.exe" or Image|endswith has "\phantomjs.exe") and (CommandLine|contains has "--headless" or CommandLine|contains has "--no-sandbox" or CommandLine|contains has "--disable-gpu" or CommandLine|contains has "--remote-debugging" or CommandLine|contains has "--user-data-dir") and (Image|endswith has "\python.exe" or Image|endswith has "\node.exe" or Image|endswith has "\powershell.exe") and (CommandLine|contains has "selenium" or CommandLine|contains has "webdriver" or CommandLine|contains has "puppeteer" or CommandLine|contains has "playwright" or CommandLine|contains has "autoclick" or CommandLine|contains has "clickbot" or CommandLine|contains has "adclick") and (Image|endswith has "\chrome.exe" or Image|endswith has "\firefox.exe" or Image|endswith has "\msedge.exe") and (CommandLine|contains has "--disable-blink-features=AutomationControlled" or CommandLine|contains has "--disable-web-security" or CommandLine|contains has "--allow-running-insecure-content" or CommandLine|contains has "--disable-features=VizDisplayCompositor" or CommandLine|contains has "--remote-debugging-port" or CommandLine|contains has "--enable-automation") and (TargetFilename|endswith has ".py" or TargetFilename|endswith has ".js" or TargetFilename|endswith has ".ps1" or TargetFilename|endswith has ".vbs") and (TargetFilename|contains has "click" or TargetFilename|contains has "auto" or TargetFilename|contains has "bot" or TargetFilename|contains has "farm" or TargetFilename|contains has "ad")
